summary: Full-stack testing of the new Employee Approval Workflow + Google-button removal. Backend: 14/14 new approval-workflow tests PASS + 40/40 regression tests PASS (54/54 total, 100%). Frontend: 5/5 critical UI flows PASS on mobile viewport (390x844). Verified end-to-end: (1) landing screen shows OTP button only, google-login-button is NOT present in DOM; (2) POST /api/onboarding sets approval_status='pending' + approval_requested_at; /auth/me returns approval_pending=true with company_name enrichment; (3) pending-approval-screen renders with correct company name in pending-approval-message and both refresh + signout buttons; (4) super_admin PATCH /admin/approve-employee action='approve' -> /auth/me flips approval_pending=false, and clicking pending-approval-refresh navigates the user to (tabs) (tab-punch visible); (5) action='reject' clears company_id + onboarded=false, and reloading routes the user to /register-choice with rejected-banner visible (including approval_note in text); (6) Admin Panel shows Pending approvals section with pending-<uid>, approve-<uid>, reject-<uid> testIDs; approve click removes the row locally without a full reload. RBAC also verified: company_admin cannot approve/reject cross-company (403), employee/unauth are blocked (403/401), super_admin sees all + can scope with ?company_id=. Legacy users with no approval_status field are treated as approved (backfilled to 'approved' in enrichment). Super_admin assigning a company_id via /admin/user-role auto-sets approval_status='approved'. Regression: OTP request/verify, session/logout, offboarding, /admin/employees, /admin/payroll all still pass.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still emits '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' warnings from landing/pending-approval/admin screens. Non-blocking (carried over from iteration_4).

action_items: (Optional) Migrate `shadow*` StyleSheet props to `boxShadow` (RN Web deprecation) — still present after iteration_4.
(Optional cleanup) In pending-approval.tsx the auto-poll interval is 20s. Consider shortening to 8-10s or listening to focus events so users unlock closer to real time after admin approval.
(Optional cleanup) server.py is now ~1454 lines — grew again — consider splitting into routers (auth, otp, admin, approvals, company, attendance, leaves, payroll, tickets).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py file size 1454 lines still exceeds the 700-line guideline. New /admin/pending-approvals + /admin/approve-employee are inline; would be cleaner in a dedicated admin_approvals router.

Backfill of legacy users happens in _enrich_user_with_company at read time (server.py:409-414) — it mutates the returned dict but does NOT persist approval_status='approved' back to DB. This is safe (idempotent per request) but every /auth/me for a legacy user re-does the branch. Consider a one-time startup backfill for cleanliness.

PATCH /admin/approve-employee reject path sets onboarded=false + company_id=None. Any active session tokens keep working which is correct (frontend routes them to /register-choice via approval_rejected flag).

PATCH /admin/user-role auto-approve is only triggered when company_id is provided (server.py:1370-1376). If super_admin only changes role to company_admin without a company_id, approval_status is NOT touched — acceptable but worth documenting.
Console warns 'shadow*' still not migrated (iteration_4 carryover).
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates fresh companies (TEST_ApprovalCo_*, TEST_A_*, TEST_B_*, UITEST_Approval_*, UIAppr_*, UI3_*) and employees via OTP dev-mode. Data is left in DB (no cleanup). Legacy accumulation should be pruned periodically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL = frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Run: EXPO_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend token key in localStorage = 'llc_session_token'. New UI testIDs: pending-approval-screen, pending-approval-message, pending-approval-refresh, pending-approval-signout, rejected-banner, pending-<user_id>, approve-<user_id>, reject-<user_id>, pending-empty. index.tsx guard order: offboarded -> rejected -> pending -> not-onboarded -> tabs. Note: when injecting a token via localStorage in Playwright, wait ~3-4s after page.goto('/') for AuthContext to bootstrap + Redirect to fire. Also note that super_admin promotion for sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com happens on the /auth/otp/verify path.
rca_of_issue: N/A — new feature works end-to-end. Approval status is stored on the user document and computed into two boolean flags (approval_pending / approval_rejected) by _enrich_user_with_company at /auth/me time. Frontend Redirect chain in index.tsx routes the user to the correct screen based on those flags. Reject path deliberately clears company_id + onboarded to force the user back through /register-choice while keeping their session valid.
